title: Merge button navigates away from workspace instead of merging
description: Clicking the 'Merge' button in the workspace header navigates the user away from the workspace view to the chat/conversations view. No merge confirmation dialog, progress indicator, or merge action is triggered.
steps: 1. Open workspace 'Investigation'. 2. Click 'Merge' button. 3. App navigates to chat view.
expected: A merge confirmation dialog should appear, or merge should be initiated with progress feedback
actual: App navigates away to chat/conversations view; no merge action taken
